name: Yggdrazil Group Public Company Limited
summary: Yggdrazil Group Public Company Limited provides visual effect, animation, and VR studio services. It offers rendering services to produce computer graphics for advertisements, music videos, and movies, as well as to produce animation. The company provides post production and production support services for commercials and feature films, as well as game, cinematic, and TV series. It has operations in Thailand, Singapore, the People's Republic of China, and internationally. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
